prerequisites.value: Acrobatics 6 ranks, Climb 6 ranks, monk level 6th.

description.value: **Benefit:** As a move action, you can move up to half your slow fall distance (maximum 50 feet) across a wall or ceiling or across ropes, branches, or even water or other surfaces that cannot support your weight. You must reach a solid, level surface by the end of your turn or you will fall.
